character.name:
Massive Alpha Lycan werewolf boss, isometric pixel art, gothic 
horror. Enormous bipedal werewolf standing upright, hulking 
muscular build. Deep black-red fur #120408, dark crimson outline 
#6a0e1a. Huge rounded shoulders with massive arms, 5 white curved 
claws per hand. Two large curved horns on skull. Compact bestial 
head with wolf snout, visible fangs. Two intense glowing red eyes 
#ff2a44 with strong glow. Red muscle lines visible on chest. 
Very large imposing silhouette, twice the size of a normal enemy. 
Crisp pixel art, dark background, transparent if possible.
